relevant and precisely 22:I[36231,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js","/_next/static/chunks/0srnp~a4huim5.js","/_next/static/chunks/09545xoqlf1~0.js","/_next/static/chunks/0a4uvox5u-8r1.js"],"CodeBlock"]

28:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
2a:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Why Hybrid?"}]
8:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Approach"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Strengths"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weaknesses"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic similarity, fuzzy matching"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Misses exact terms, no boolean logic"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Text only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Exact matching, boolean queries"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No semantic understanding, synonym blind"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hybrid"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Best of both"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Slightly higher latency"}]}]]}]]}]]}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Fusion Algorithm"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," method performs hybrid search using a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"configurable"}]," scoring formula with tunable weights:"]}]
b:["$","$L22",null,{"code":"# Step 1: Weighted combination of scores (weights default to 50/30/20)\nbase_score = (vector_score * vec_weight +\n           fts_score * fts_weight +\n           importance * importance_weight) / (vec_weight + fts_weight + importance_weight)\n\n# Step 2: Apply temporal recency decay\nfinal_score = base_score * (1.0 - temporal_weight + temporal_weight * recency_decay)\n","language":"python"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Default weights:"}]
d:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}],"): 50.0 — semantic similarity via BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384 dims"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"FTS5"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}],"): 30.0 — BM25 text relevance"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}],"): 20.0 — memory importance rating, 0.0–1.0"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Temporal"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}],"): 0.3 — controls how much recency decay influences the final score"]}],"\n"]}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["The recency decay uses an exponential half-life (",["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}],", default 168 hours / 7 days)."]}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"All weights are configurable per-query — see usage examples below."}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Usage"}]
11:["$","$L22",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Default hybrid search — balanced 50/30/20 weights\nresults = mem.recall(\"What database does the project use?\", top_k=5)\n\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"Score: {r['score']:.3f}\")\n  print(f\"  Content: {r['content'][:100]}\")\n  print(f\"  Source: {r['source']}\")\n","language":"python"}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Tuning Retrieval Weights"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":"Override the default weights per query to match your use case:"}]
14:["$","$L22",null,{"code":"# Boost exact text matching for error codes, identifiers\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"error code E501 in linter\",\n  vec_weight=20.0,\n  fts_weight=60.0,\n  importance_weight=20.0,\n)\n\n# Maximize semantic similarity for conceptual queries\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"how does authentication work?\",\n  vec_weight=70.0,\n  fts_weight=20.0,\n  importance_weight=10.0,\n)\n\n# Emphasize recency for \"what happened lately\" queries\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"what did we discuss this week?\",\n  temporal_weight=0.6,\n  temporal_halflife=48.0,  # 48-hour half-life\n)\n\n# Point-in-time temporal query\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"decisions from January\",\n  query_time=\"2026-01-31T23:59:59Z\",\n  temporal_weight=0.1,  # minimal recency bias\n)\n","language":"python"}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Result Format"}]
16:["$","$L22",null,{"code":"[\n  {\n      \"id\": \"mem_abc123\",\n      \"content\": \"We decided to use PostgreSQL for the primary database...\",\n      \"score\": 0.92,\n      \"source\": \"decision\",\n      \"importance\": 0.8,\n      \"created_at\": 1714060800,\n  },\n  ...\n]\n","language":"python"}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Working Memory Retrieval"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"When searching Working Memory (recent, non-consolidated entries), a keyword-based fallback is used with different weights than the episodic formula. This handles the case where vector embeddings may not yet be available for very recent entries."}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Performance"}]
1a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Query Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Median Latency"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"p99 Latency"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"35ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"120ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"45ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid (default)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"65ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"180ms"}]]}]]}]]}]
1b:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L23",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Index Requirements"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Hybrid search requires both vector and FTS5 indices to be built. These are created automatically on first use. Initial index build may take a few seconds for large datasets."}]}]]}]]}]}]
